meta.title: Training High School Students on ICS Security
meta.description:
At S4x17 Matt Luallen of Cybati trained 15 Palm Beach County high school students with hands on ICS security modules. We upped the ante at S4x18 and had a train the teacher session at the event.

The goal: have a set of trained teachers and curriculum beginning in the fall 2018 semester so students in the Palm Beach County technical programs can learn ICS security in hands on multi-week classes. 

The good news is the Cyber Academy and Engineering Academy schools have 6 of the training kits and are planning to use it this academic year.
